tEn: SmoothQuant: Accurate and Efficient Post-Training Quantization for Large Language Models
tZh: SmoothQuant：大型语言模型的准确高效训练后量化
sEn: SmoothQuant enables accurate and efficient 8-bit weight and activation quantization for LLMs without training.
sZh: SmoothQuant 实现了大型语言模型无需训练的8位权重和激活量化，准确且高效。
absEn: Large language models (LLMs) show excellent performance but are compute- and memory-intensive. Quantization can reduce memory and accelerate inference. However, existing methods cannot maintain accuracy and hardware efficiency at the same time. We propose SmoothQuant, a training-free, accuracy-preserving, and general-purpose post-training quantization (PTQ) solution to enable 8-bit weight, 8-bit activation (W8A8) quantization for LLMs. Based on the fact that weights are easy to quantize while activations are not, SmoothQuant smooths the activation outliers by offline migrating the quantization difficulty from activations to weights with a mathematically equivalent transformation. SmoothQuant enables an INT8 quantization of both weights and activations for all the matrix multiplications in LLMs, including OPT, BLOOM, GLM, MT-NLG, Llama-1/2, Falcon, Mistral, and Mixtral models. We demonstrate up to 1.56x speedup and 2x memory reduction for LLMs with negligible loss in accuracy. SmoothQuant enables serving 530B LLM within a single node. Our work offers a turn-key solution that reduces hardware costs and democratizes LLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/mit-han-lab/smoothquant.
absZh: 大型语言模型（LLM）表现出色，但计算和内存密集。量化可以减少内存并加速推理。然而，现有方法无法同时保持准确性和硬件效率。我们提出SmoothQuant，一种无需训练、保持精度且通用的训练后量化（PTQ）解决方案，为LLM实现8位权重、8位激活（W8A8）量化。基于权重易于量化而激活不易的事实，SmoothQuant通过离线将量化难度从激活迁移到权重（使用数学等价变换）来平滑激活异常值。SmoothQuant实现了LLM中所有矩阵乘法的INT8权重和激活量化，包括OPT、BLOOM、GLM、MT-NLG、Llama-1/2、Falcon、Mistral和Mixtral模型。我们展示了高达1.56倍的加速和2倍的内存减少，且精度损失可忽略。SmoothQuant使得在单个节点内服务530B LLM成为可能。我们的工作提供了一种交钥匙解决方案，降低了硬件成本并普及了LLM。代码可在https://github.com/mit-han-lab/smoothquant获取。

contrib.en: Proposes SmoothQuant, a training-free post-training quantization method for LLMs enabling W8A8 quantization.
contrib.zh: 提出SmoothQuant，一种无需训练的后训练量化方法，实现大语言模型的W8A8量化。

contrib.en: Identifies activation outliers as key quantization difficulty and smooths them via offline migration to weights.
contrib.zh: 识别激活值异常值为量化主要难点，并通过离线迁移至权重来平滑它们。

contrib.en: Achieves up to 1.56x speedup and 2x memory reduction with negligible accuracy loss across multiple LLM families.
contrib.zh: 在多种大语言模型上实现高达1.56倍加速和2倍内存减少，精度损失可忽略。

contrib.en: Enables serving a 530B parameter LLM within a single 8-GPU node.
contrib.zh: 支持在单个8-GPU节点上部署530B参数的大语言模型。

contrib.en: Integrates into PyTorch and FasterTransformer for practical deployment.
contrib.zh: 集成到PyTorch和FasterTransformer中，便于实际部署。

contrib.en: Demonstrates effectiveness on OPT, BLOOM, GLM, LLaMA, and MT-NLG models up to 530B parameters.
contrib.zh: 在OPT、BLOOM、GLM、LLaMA和MT-NLG等高达530B参数的模型上验证有效性。

limits.en: Requires calibration data (512 sentences) to compute smoothing factors and quantization steps.
limits.zh: 需要校准数据（512个句子）来计算平滑因子和量化步长。

limits.en: Hyperparameter α must be tuned per model family (e.g., 0.5 for OPT/BLOOM, 0.75 for GLM).
limits.zh: 超参数α需针对不同模型族调整（如OPT/BLOOM用0.5，GLM用0.75）。

limits.en: Static quantization may cause accuracy drop when calibration and evaluation distributions differ.
limits.zh: 当校准与评估数据分布不同时，静态量化可能导致精度下降。

limits.en: Method focuses on linear and attention layers; other operations remain in FP16.
limits.zh: 方法仅针对线性层和注意力层，其他操作仍保持FP16。

limits.en: Effectiveness depends on model architecture; some models (e.g., GLM) require stronger smoothing.
limits.zh: 效果依赖于模型架构，某些模型（如GLM）需要更强的平滑处理。

items.en: Large language models (LLMs) show excellent performance but are compute- and memory-intensive. Quantization can reduce memory and accelerate inference. However, existing methods cannot maintain accuracy and hardware efficiency at the same time. We propose SmoothQuant, a training-free, accuracy-preserving, and general-purpose post-training quantization (PTQ) solution to enable 8-bit weight, 8-bit activation (W8A8) quantization for LLMs. Based on the fact that weights are easy to quantize while activations are not, SmoothQuant smooths the activation outliers by offline migrating the quantization difficulty from activations to weights with a mathematically equivalent transformation. SmoothQuant enables an INT8 quantization of both weights and activations for all the matrix multiplications in LLMs, including OPT, BLOOM, GLM, MT-NLG, and LLaMA family. We demonstrate up to 1.56×\times speedup and 2×\times memory reduction for LLMs with negligible loss in accuracy. SmoothQuant enables serving 530B LLM within a single node. Our work offers a turn-key solution that reduces hardware costs and democratizes LLMs.
items.zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）表现出色，但计算和内存密集。量化可以减少内存并加速推理。然而，现有方法无法同时保持准确性和硬件效率。我们提出SmoothQuant，一种无需训练、保持精度且通用的训练后量化（PTQ）解决方案，用于实现LLM的8位权重、8位激活（W8A8）量化。基于权重易于量化而激活不易量化的观察，SmoothQuant通过数学上等价的变换，离线将量化难度从激活迁移到权重，从而平滑激活异常值。SmoothQuant实现了LLM中所有矩阵乘法的INT8权重和激活量化，包括OPT、BLOOM、GLM、MT-NLG和LLaMA系列。我们展示了高达1.56倍的加速和2倍的内存减少，且精度损失可忽略。SmoothQuant使得在单个节点内服务530B LLM成为可能。我们的工作提供了一种交钥匙解决方案，降低了硬件成本并普及了LLM。

items.en: https://github.com/mit-han-lab/smoothquant
items.zh: https://github.com/mit-han-lab/smoothquant

items.en: Large-scale language models (LLMs) show excellent performance on various tasks (Brown et al., 2020a; Zhang et al., 2022). However, serving LLMs is budget and energy-consuming due to their gigantic model size. For example, the GPT-3 (Brown et al., 2020a) model contains 175B parameters, which will consume at least 350GB of memory to store and run in FP16, requiring 8×\times48GB A6000 GPUs or 5×\times80GB A100 GPUs just for inference. Due to the huge computation and communication overhead, the inference latency may also be unacceptable to real-world applications. Quantization is a promising way to reduce the cost of LLMs (Dettmers et al., 2022; Yao et al., 2022). By quantizing the weights and activations with low-bit integers, we can reduce GPU memory requirements, in size and bandwidth, and accelerate compute-intensive operations (i.e., GEMM in linear layers, BMM in attention). For instance, INT8 quantization of weights and activations can halve the GPU memory usage and nearly double the throughput of matrix multiplications compared to FP16.
items.zh: 大规模语言模型（LLM）在各种任务上表现出色（Brown等人，2020a；Zhang等人，2022）。然而，由于其巨大的模型规模，服务LLM在预算和能耗上都很昂贵。例如，GPT-3（Brown等人，2020a）模型包含175B参数，以FP16格式存储和运行至少需要350GB内存，仅推理就需要8块48GB A6000 GPU或5块80GB A100 GPU。由于巨大的计算和通信开销，推理延迟可能对实际应用不可接受。量化是降低LLM成本的一种有前景的方法（Dettmers等人，2022；Yao等人，2022）。通过使用低位整数量化权重和激活，我们可以减少GPU内存需求（大小和带宽），并加速计算密集型操作（即线性层中的GEMM，注意力中的BMM）。例如，与FP16相比，权重和激活的INT8量化可以将GPU内存使用减半，并使矩阵乘法的吞吐量几乎翻倍。

items.capEn: Figure 1: The model size of large language models is developing at a faster pace than the GPU memory in recent years, leading to a big gap between the supply and demand for memory. Quantization and model compression techniques can help bridge the gap.
items.capZh: 图1：近年来，大型语言模型的模型规模增长速度超过GPU内存，导致内存供需之间存在巨大差距。量化和模型压缩技术有助于缩小这一差距。

items.en: However, unlike CNN models or smaller transformer models like BERT (Devlin et al., 2019), the activations of LLMs are difficult to quantize. When we scale up LLMs beyond 6.7B parameters, systematic outliers with large magnitude will emerge in activations (Dettmers et al., 2022), leading to large quantization errors and accuracy degradation. ZeroQuant (Yao et al., 2022) applies dynamic per-token activation quantization and group-wise weight quantization (defined in Figure 3 Sec. 2). It can be implemented efficiently and delivers good accuracy for GPT-3-350M and GPT-J-6B. However, it can not maintain the accuracy for the large OPT model with 175 billion parameters (see Section 5.2). LLM.int8() (Dettmers et al., 2022) addresses that accuracy issue by further introducing a mixed-precision decomposition (i.e., it keeps outliers in FP16 and uses INT8 for the other activations). However, it is hard to implement the decomposition efficiently on hardware accelerators. Therefore, deriving an efficient, hardware-friendly, and preferably training-free quantization scheme for LLMs that would use INT8 for all the compute-intensive operations remains an open challenge.
items.zh: 然而，与CNN模型或较小的Transformer模型（如BERT（Devlin等人，2019））不同，LLM的激活难以量化。当我们将LLM扩展到超过6.7B参数时，激活中会出现具有大幅度的系统性异常值（Dettmers等人，2022），导致较大的量化误差和精度下降。ZeroQuant（Yao等人，2022）应用了动态每标记激活量化和分组权重量化（定义见图3第2节）。它可以高效实现，并为GPT-3-350M和GPT-J-6B提供了良好的精度。然而，对于具有1750亿参数的大型OPT模型，它无法保持精度（见第5.2节）。LLM.int8()（Dettmers等人，2022）通过进一步引入混合精度分解（即，将异常值保留在FP16中，对其他激活使用INT8）解决了精度问题。然而，在硬件加速器上高效实现该分解是困难的。因此，为LLM推导一种高效、硬件友好且最好无需训练的量化方案，使其对所有计算密集型操作使用INT8，仍然是一个开放的挑战。

items.en: We propose SmoothQuant, an accurate and efficient post-training quantization (PTQ) solution for LLMs. SmoothQuant relies on a key observation: even if activations are much harder to quantize than weights due to the presence of outliers (Dettmers et al., 2022), different tokens exhibit similar variations across their channels.
items.zh: 我们提出SmoothQuant，一种针对LLM的准确且高效的训练后量化（PTQ）解决方案。SmoothQuant基于一个关键观察：尽管由于异常值的存在，激活比权重更难量化（Dettmers等人，2022），但不同标记在其通道间表现出相似的变化。

items.capEn: Figure 2: SmoothQuant’s intuition: the activation 𝐗𝐗\mathbf{X} is hard to quantize because outliers stretch the quantization range, leaving few effective bits for most values. We migrate the scale variance from activations to weights 𝐖𝐖\mathbf{W} during offline to reduce the quantization difficulty of activations. The smoothed activation 𝐗^^𝐗\hat{\mathbf{X}} and the adjusted weight 𝐖^^𝐖\hat{\mathbf{W}} are both easy to quantize.
items.capZh: 图2：SmoothQuant的直觉：激活X难以量化，因为异常值拉伸了量化范围，使得大多数值只有很少的有效位。我们在离线时将缩放方差从激活迁移到权重W，以降低激活的量化难度。平滑后的激活X̂和调整后的权重Ŵ都易于量化。

items.en: Based on this observation, SmoothQuant offline migrates the quantization difficulty from activations to weights (Figure 2). SmoothQuant proposes a mathematically equivalent per-channel scaling transformation that significantly smooths the magnitude across the channels, making the model quantization-friendly. Since SmoothQuant is compatible with various quantization schemes, we implement three efficiency levels of quantization settings for SmoothQuant (see Table 2, O1-O3). Experiments show that SmoothQuant is hardware-efficient: it can maintain the performance of OPT-175B (Zhang et al., 2022), BLOOM-176B (Scao et al., 2022) , GLM-130B (Zeng et al., 2022), and MT-NLG 530B (Smith et al., 2022), leading to up to 1.51×\times speed up and 1.96×\times memory saving on PyTorch. SmoothQuant is easy to implement. We integrate SmoothQuant into FasterTransformer, the state-of-the-art transformer serving framework, achieving up to 1.56×\times speedup and halving the memory usage compared with FP16. Remarkably, SmoothQuant allows serving large models like OPT-175B using only half number of GPUs compared to FP16 while being faster, and enabling the serving of a 530B model within one 8-GPU node. Our work democratizes the use of LLMs by offering a turnkey solution to reduce the serving cost. We hope SmoothQuant can inspire greater use of LLMs in the future.
items.zh: 基于这一观察，SmoothQuant离线将量化难度从激活迁移到权重（图2）。SmoothQuant提出了一种数学上等价的每通道缩放变换，显著平滑了通道间的幅度，使模型对量化友好。由于SmoothQuant与各种量化方案兼容，我们实现了三种效率级别的量化设置（见表2，O1-O3）。实验表明，SmoothQuant硬件高效：它可以保持OPT-175B（Zhang等人，2022）、BLOOM-176B（Scao等人，2022）、GLM-130B（Zeng等人，2022）和MT-NLG 530B（Smith等人，2022）的性能，在PyTorch上实现高达1.51倍的加速和1.96倍的内存节省。SmoothQuant易于实现。我们将SmoothQuant集成到FasterTransformer（最先进的Transformer服务框架）中，与FP16相比，实现了高达1.56倍的加速和内存使用减半。值得注意的是，SmoothQuant允许使用比FP16少一半的GPU来服务大型模型（如OPT-175B），同时速度更快，并使得在单个8-GPU节点内服务530B模型成为可能。我们的工作通过提供降低服务成本的交钥匙解决方案，普及了LLM的使用。我们希望SmoothQuant能够激发未来对LLM的更多应用。

items.zh: 量化将高精度值映射到离散级别。我们研究整数均匀量化（Jacob等人，2018）（特别是INT8）以获得更好的硬件支持和效率。量化过程可以表示为：

items.en: where 𝐗𝐗\mathbf{X} is the floating-point tensor, 𝐗¯¯𝐗\bar{\mathbf{X}} is the quantized counterpart, ΔΔ\Delta is the quantization step size, ⌈⋅⌋delimited-⌈⌋⋅\lceil\cdot\rfloor is the rounding function, and N𝑁N is the number of bits (8 in our case). Here we assume the tensor is symmetric at 0 for simplicity; the discussion is similar for asymmetric cases (e.g., after ReLU) by adding a zero-point (Jacob et al., 2018).
items.zh: 其中X是浮点张量，X̄是量化后的对应张量，Δ是量化步长，⌈·⌋是取整函数，N是位数（此处为8）。这里我们假设张量关于0对称以简化；非对称情况（例如ReLU后）的讨论类似，通过添加零点（Jacob等人，2018）。

items.en: Such quantizer uses the maximum absolute value to calculate ΔΔ\Delta so that it preserves the outliers in activation, which are found to be important for accuracy (Dettmers et al., 2022). We can calculate ΔΔ\Delta offline with the activations of some calibration samples, what we call static quantization. We can also use the runtime statistics of activations to get ΔΔ\Delta, what we call dynamic quantization.
items.zh: 这种量化器使用最大绝对值计算Δ，从而保留激活中的异常值，这些异常值被发现对精度很重要（Dettmers等人，2022）。我们可以使用一些校准样本的激活离线计算Δ，这称为静态量化。我们也可以使用激活的运行时统计信息获取Δ，这称为动态量化。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Definition of per-tensor, per-token, and per-channel quantization. Per-tensor quantization is the most efficient to implement. For vector-wise quantization to efficiently utilize the INT8 GEMM kernels, we can only use scaling factors from the outer dimensions (i.e., token dimension T𝑇T and out channel dimension Cosubscript𝐶𝑜C_{o}) but not inner dimension (i.e., in channel dimension Cisubscript𝐶𝑖C_{i}).
items.capZh: 图3：每张量、每标记和每通道量化的定义。每张量量化实现效率最高。对于向量级量化以高效利用INT8 GEMM内核，我们只能使用外部维度（即标记维度T和输出通道维度Co）的缩放因子，而不能使用内部维度（即输入通道维度Ci）。

items.en: As shown in Figure 3, quantization has different granularity levels. The per-tensor quantization uses a single step size for the entire matrix. We can further enable finer-grained quantization by using different quantization step sizes for activations associated with each token (per-token quantization) or each output channel of weights (per-channel quantization). A coarse-grained version of per-channel quantization is to use different quantization steps for different channel groups, called group-wise quantization (Shen et al., 2020; Yao et al., 2022).
items.zh: 如图3所示，量化具有不同的粒度级别。每张量量化对整个矩阵使用单个步长。我们可以进一步通过使用与每个标记（每标记量化）或权重的每个输出通道（每通道量化）相关的不同量化步长来实现更细粒度的量化。每通道量化的粗粒度版本是对不同的通道组使用不同的量化步长，称为分组量化（Shen等人，2020；Yao等人，2022）。

items.en: For a linear layer in Transformers (Vaswani et al., 2017) 𝐘=𝐗⋅𝐖,𝐘∈ℝT×Co,𝐗∈ℝT×Ci,𝐖∈ℝCi×Coformulae-sequence𝐘⋅𝐗𝐖formulae-sequence𝐘superscriptℝ𝑇subscript𝐶𝑜formulae-sequence𝐗superscriptℝ𝑇subscript𝐶𝑖𝐖superscriptℝsubscript𝐶𝑖subscript𝐶𝑜\mathbf{Y}=\mathbf{X}\cdot\mathbf{W},\mathbf{Y}\in\mathbb{R}^{T\times C_{o}},\mathbf{X}\in\mathbb{R}^{T\times C_{i}},\mathbf{W}\in\mathbb{R}^{C_{i}\times C_{o}}, where T𝑇T is the number of tokens, Cisubscript𝐶𝑖C_{i} is the input channel, and Cosubscript𝐶𝑜C_{o} is the output channel (see Figure 3, we omit the batch dimension for simplicity), we can reduce the storage by half compared to FP16 by quantizing the weights to INT8. However, to speed up the inference, we need to quantize both weights and activations into INT8 (i.e., W8A8) to utilize the integer kernels (e.g., INT8 GEMM), which are supported by a wide range of hardware (e.g., NVIDIA GPUs, Intel CPUs, Qualcomm DSPs, etc.).
items.zh: 对于Transformer（Vaswani等人，2017）中的线性层Y = X·W，Y∈ℝ^{T×Co}，X∈ℝ^{T×Ci}，W∈ℝ^{Ci×Co}，其中T是标记数，Ci是输入通道，Co是输出通道（见图3，为简化省略批次维度），通过将权重量化为INT8，我们可以将存储减少一半（与FP16相比）。然而，为了加速推理，我们需要将权重和激活都量化为INT8（即W8A8），以利用整数内核（例如INT8 GEMM），这些内核得到广泛硬件支持（例如NVIDIA GPU、Intel CPU、Qualcomm DSP等）。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Magnitude of the input activations and weights of a linear layer in OPT-13B before and after SmoothQuant. Observations: (1) there are a few channels in the original activation map whose magnitudes are very large (greater than 70); (2) the variance in one activation channel is small; (3) the original weight distribution is flat and uniform. SmoothQuant migrates the outlier channels from activation to weight. In the end, the outliers in the activation are greatly smoothed while the weight is still pretty smooth and flat.
items.capZh: 图4：OPT-13B中线性层的输入激活和权重在SmoothQuant前后的幅度。观察结果：（1）原始激活图中存在少数通道的幅度非常大（大于70）；（2）每个激活通道内的方差很小；（3）原始权重分布平坦且均匀。SmoothQuant将异常值通道从激活迁移到权重。最终，激活中的异常值被大幅平滑，而权重仍然相当平滑和均匀。

items.en: LLMs are notoriously difficult to quantize due to the outliers in the activations (Dettmers et al., 2022; Wei et al., 2022; Bondarenko et al., 2021). We first review the difficulties of activation quantization and look for a pattern amongst outliers. We visualize the input activations and the weights of a linear layer that has a large quantization error in Figure 4 (left). We can find several patterns that motivate our method:
items.zh: 由于激活中的异常值，LLM以难以量化而闻名（Dettmers等人，2022；Wei等人，2022；Bondarenko等人，2021）。我们首先回顾激活量化的困难，并在异常值中寻找模式。我们在图4（左）中可视化了具有较大量化误差的线性层的输入激活和权重。我们可以发现几个模式，这些模式启发了我们的方法：

items.en: 1. Activations are harder to quantize than weights. The weight distribution is quite uniform and flat, which is easy to quantize. Previous work has shown that quantizing the weights of LLMs with INT8 or even with INT4 does not degrade accuracy (Dettmers et al., 2022; Yao et al., 2022; Zeng et al., 2022), which echoes our observation.
items.zh: 1. 激活比权重更难量化。权重分布相当均匀且平坦，易于量化。先前的工作表明，将LLM的权重量化为INT8甚至INT4不会降低精度（Dettmers等人，2022；Yao等人，2022；Zeng等人，2022），这与我们的观察一致。

items.en: 2. Outliers make activation quantization difficult. The scale of outliers in activations is ∼100×\sim 100\times larger than most of the activation values. In the case of per-tensor quantization (Equation 1), the large outliers dominate the maximum magnitude measurement, leading to low effective quantization bits/levels (Figure 2) for non-outlier channels: suppose the maximum magnitude of channel i𝑖i is misubscript𝑚𝑖m_{i}, and the maximum value of the whole matrix is m𝑚m, the effective quantization levels of channel i𝑖i is 28⋅mi/m⋅superscript28subscript𝑚𝑖𝑚2^{8}\cdot m_{i}/m. For non-outlier channels, the effective quantization levels would be very small (2-3), leading to large quantization errors.
items.zh: 2. 异常值使激活量化困难。激活中异常值的尺度比大多数激活值大约100倍。在每张量量化（公式1）的情况下，大的异常值主导了最大幅度测量，导致非异常值通道的有效量化位数/级别较低（图2）：假设通道i的最大幅度为m_i，整个矩阵的最大值为m，则通道i的有效量化级别为2^8·m_i/m。对于非异常值通道，有效量化级别会非常小（2-3），导致较大的量化误差。

items.en: 3. Outliers persist in fixed channels. Outliers appear in a small fraction of the channels. If one channel has an outlier, it persistently appears in all tokens (Figure 4, red). The variance amongst the channels for a given token is large (the activations in some channels are very large, but most are small), but the variance between the magnitudes of a given channel across tokens is small (outlier channels are consistently large).
items.zh: 3. 异常值持续存在于固定通道中。异常值出现在一小部分通道中。如果一个通道有异常值，它会持续出现在所有标记中（图4，红色）。给定标记的通道间方差很大（某些通道的激活非常大，但大多数很小），但给定通道跨标记的幅度方差很小（异常值通道始终很大）。

items.en: Due to the persistence of outliers and the small variance inside each channel, if we could perform per-channel quantization (Bondarenko et al., 2021) of the activation (i.e., using a different quantization step for each channel), the quantization error would be much smaller compared to per-tensor quantization, while per-token quantization helps little. In Table 1, we verify the assumption that simulated per-channel activation quantization successfully bridges the accuracy with the FP16 baseline, which echos the findings of Bondarenko et al..
items.zh: 由于异常值的持久性和每个通道内的小方差，如果我们能够对激活进行每通道量化（Bondarenko等人，2021）（即对每个通道使用不同的量化步长），与每张量量化相比，量化误差会小得多，而每标记量化帮助不大。在表1中，我们验证了模拟的每通道激活量化成功地将精度与FP16基线对齐，这与Bondarenko等人的发现一致。

items.en: However, per-channel activation quantization does not map well to hardware-accelerated GEMM kernels, that rely on a sequence of operations executed at a high throughput (e.g., Tensor Core MMAs) and do not tolerate the insertion of instructions with a lower throughput (e.g., conversions or CUDA Core FMAs) in that sequence. In those kernels, scaling can only be performed along the outer dimensions of the matrix multiplication (i.e., token dimension of activations T𝑇T, output channel dimension of weights Cosubscript𝐶𝑜C_{o}, see Figure 3), which can be applied after the matrix multiplication finishes:
items.zh: 然而，逐通道激活量化并不适用于硬件加速的GEMM内核，这些内核依赖于以高吞吐量执行的一系列操作（例如Tensor Core MMA），并且无法容忍在该序列中插入低吞吐量的指令（例如转换或CUDA Core FMA）。在这些内核中，Scaling只能沿矩阵乘法的外维度进行（即激活的token维度T，权重的输出通道维度C_o，见图3），并且可以在矩阵乘法完成后应用。

items.en: Therefore, previous works all use per-token activation quantization for linear layers (Dettmers et al., 2022; Yao et al., 2022), although they cannot address the difficulty of activation quantization (only slightly better than per-tensor).
items.zh: 因此，先前的工作都对线性层使用逐token激活量化（Dettmers等人，2022；Yao等人，2022），尽管它们无法解决激活量化的困难（仅略优于逐张量量化）。

items.en: Instead of per-channel activation quantization (which is infeasible), we propose to “smooth” the input activation by dividing it by a per-channel smoothing factor 𝐬∈ℝCi𝐬superscriptℝsubscript𝐶𝑖\mathbf{s}\in\mathbb{R}^{C_{i}}. To keep the mathematical equivalence of a linear layer, we scale the weights accordingly in the reversed direction:
items.zh: 我们提出通过将输入激活除以逐通道平滑因子s∈R^{C_i}来“平滑”输入激活，而不是使用逐通道激活量化（不可行）。为了保持线性层的数学等价性，我们相应地按相反方向缩放权重：

items.en: Considering input 𝐗𝐗\mathbf{X} is usually produced from previous linear operations (e.g., linear layers, layer norms, etc.), we can easily fuse the smoothing factor into previous layers’ parameters offline, which doe not incur kernel call overhead from an extra scaling. For some other cases, when the input is from a residual add, we can add an extra scaling to the residual branch similar to Wei et al. (2022).
items.zh: 考虑到输入X通常来自先前的线性运算（例如线性层、层归一化等），我们可以轻松地将平滑因子离线融合到先前层的参数中，这不会因额外的缩放而引入内核调用开销。对于其他情况，当输入来自残差相加时，我们可以向残差分支添加额外的缩放，类似于Wei等人（2022）。

items.en: We aim to choose a per-channel smoothing factor 𝐬𝐬\mathbf{s} such that 𝐗^=𝐗​diag​(𝐬)−1^𝐗𝐗diagsuperscript𝐬1\hat{\mathbf{X}}=\mathbf{X}\text{diag}(\mathbf{s})^{-1} is easy to quantize. To reduce the quantization error, we should increase the effective quantization bits for all the channels. The total effective quantization bits would be largest when all the channels have the same maximum magnitude. Therefore, a straight-forward choice is 𝐬j=max⁡(|𝐗j|),j=1,2,…,Ciformulae-sequencesubscript𝐬𝑗subscript𝐗𝑗𝑗12…subscript𝐶𝑖\mathbf{s}_{j}=\max(|\mathbf{X}_{j}|),j=1,2,...,C_{i}, where j𝑗j corresponds to j𝑗j-th input channel. This choice ensures that after the division, all the activation channels will have the same maximum value, which is easy to quantize. Note that the range of activations is dynamic; it varies for different input samples. Here, we estimate the scale of activations channels using calibration samples from the pre-training dataset (Jacob et al., 2018). However, this formula pushes all the quantization difficulties to the weights. We find that, in this case, the quantization errors would be large for the weights (outlier channels are migrated to weights now), leading to a large accuracy degradation (see Figure 10). On the other hand, we can also push all the quantization difficulty from weights to activations by choosing 𝐬j=1/max⁡(|𝐖j|)subscript𝐬𝑗1subscript𝐖𝑗\mathbf{s}_{j}=1/\max(|\mathbf{W}_{j}|). Similarly, the model performance is bad due to the activation quantization errors. Therefore, we need to split the quantization difficulty between weights and activations so that they are both easy to quantize.
items.zh: 我们旨在选择一个逐通道平滑因子s，使得X̂ = X diag(s)^{-1}易于量化。为了减少量化误差，我们应该增加所有通道的有效量化比特数。当所有通道具有相同的最大幅度时，总有效量化比特数最大。因此，一个直接的选择是s_j = max(|X_j|), j=1,2,...,C_i，其中j对应第j个输入通道。这个选择确保除法后所有激活通道具有相同的最大值，易于量化。注意，激活的范围是动态的；它随不同输入样本而变化。这里，我们使用预训练数据集中的校准样本来估计激活通道的尺度（Jacob等人，2018）。然而，这个公式将所有量化困难推给了权重。我们发现，在这种情况下，权重的量化误差会很大（异常通道现在迁移到了权重），导致较大的精度下降（见图10）。另一方面，我们也可以通过选择s_j = 1/max(|W_j|)将所有量化困难从权重推到激活。类似地，由于激活量化误差，模型性能也很差。因此，我们需要在权重和激活之间分配量化困难，使它们都易于量化。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Main idea of SmoothQuant when α𝛼\alpha is 0.50.50.5. The smoothing factor s𝑠s is obtained on calibration samples and the entire transformation is performed offline. At runtime, the activations are smooth without scaling.
items.capZh: 图5：当α=0.5时SmoothQuant的主要思想。平滑因子s在校准样本上获得，整个变换离线执行。在运行时，激活是平滑的，无需缩放。

items.en: Here we introduce a hyper-parameter, migration strength α𝛼\alpha, to control how much difficulty we want to migrate from activation to weights, using the following equation:
items.zh: 这里我们引入一个超参数，迁移强度α，来控制我们希望从激活迁移到权重的困难程度，使用以下方程：

items.en: We find that for most of the models, e.g., all OPT (Zhang et al., 2022) and BLOOM (Scao et al., 2022) models, α=0.5𝛼0.5\alpha=0.5 is a well-balanced point to evenly split the quantization difficulty, especially when we are using the same quantizer for weights and activations (e.g., per-tensor, static quantization). The formula ensures that the weights and activations at the corresponding channel share a similar maximum value, thus sharing the same quantization difficulty. Figure 5 illustrates the smoothing transformation when we take α=0.5𝛼0.5\alpha=0.5. For some other models where activation outliers are more significant (e.g., GLM-130B (Zeng et al., 2022) has ∼similar-to\sim30% outliers, which are more difficult for activation quantization), we can choose a larger α𝛼\alpha to migrate more quantization difficulty to weights (like 0.75).
items.zh: 我们发现，对于大多数模型，例如所有OPT（Zhang等人，2022）和BLOOM（Scao等人，2022）模型，α=0.5是一个平衡点，可以均匀分配量化困难，特别是当我们对权重和激活使用相同的量化器时（例如逐张量、静态量化）。该公式确保对应通道的权重和激活共享相似的最大值，从而共享相同的量化困难。图5展示了当α=0.5时的平滑变换。对于其他激活异常更显著的模型（例如GLM-130B（Zeng等人，2022）有约30%的异常，激活量化更困难），我们可以选择更大的α（如0.75）将更多量化困难迁移到权重。

items.capEn: Figure 6: SmoothQuant’s precision mapping for a Transformer block. All compute-intensive operators like linear layers and batched matmul (BMMs) use INT8 arithmetic.
items.capZh: 图6：SmoothQuant在Transformer块上的精度映射。所有计算密集型算子如线性层和批量矩阵乘法（BMM）都使用INT8算术。

items.en: Linear layers take up most of the parameters and computation of LLM models. By default, we perform scale smoothing for the input activations of self-attention and feed-forward layers and quantize all linear layers with W8A8. We also quantize BMM operators in the attention computation. We design a quantization flow for transformer blocks in Figure 6. We quantize the inputs and weights of compute-heavy operators like linear layers and BMM in attention layers with INT8, while keeping the activation as FP16 for other lightweight element-wise operations like ReLU, Softmax, and LayerNorm. Such a design helps us to balance accuracy and inference efficiency.
items.zh: 线性层占据了LLM模型的大部分参数和计算。默认情况下，我们对自注意力和前馈层的输入激活进行尺度平滑，并以W8A8量化所有线性层。我们还量化注意力计算中的BMM算子。我们为图6中的Transformer块设计了一个量化流程。我们将计算密集型算子（如线性层和注意力层中的BMM）的输入和权重量化为INT8，而将其他轻量级逐元素操作（如ReLU、Softmax和LayerNorm）的激活保持为FP16。这种设计有助于我们平衡精度和推理效率。

items.en: We compare with four baselines in the INT8 post-training quantization setting, i.e., without re-training of the model parameters: W8A8 naive quantization, ZeroQuant (Yao et al., 2022), LLM.int8() (Dettmers et al., 2022), and Outlier Suppression (Wei et al., 2022). Since SmoothQuant is orthogonal to the quantization schemes, we provide gradually aggressive and efficient quantization levels from O1 to O3. The detailed quantization schemes of the baselines and SmoothQuant are shown in Table 2.
items.zh: 我们在INT8后训练量化设置中与四个基线进行比较，即不重新训练模型参数：W8A8朴素量化、ZeroQuant（Yao等人，2022）、LLM.int8()（Dettmers等人，2022）和Outlier Suppression（Wei等人，2022）。由于SmoothQuant与量化方案正交，我们提供了从O1到O3逐渐激进和高效的量化级别。基线和SmoothQuant的详细量化方案见表2。

items.en: We choose three families of LLMs to evaluate SmoothQuant: OPT (Zhang et al., 2022), BLOOM (Scao et al., 2022), and GLM-130B (Zeng et al., 2022). We use seven zero-shot evaluation tasks: LAMBADA (Paperno et al., 2016), HellaSwag (Zellers et al., 2019), PIQA (Bisk et al., 2020), WinoGrande (Sakaguchi et al., 2019), OpenBookQA (Mihaylov et al., 2018), RTE (Wang et al., 2018), COPA (Roemmele et al., 2011), and one language modeling dataset WikiText (Merity et al., 2016) to evaluate the OPT and BLOOM models. We use MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2020), MNLI (Williams et al., 2018), QNLI (Wang et al., 2018) and LAMBADA to evaluate the GLM-130B model because some of the aforementioned benchmarks appear in the training set of GLM-130B. We use lm-eval-harness***https://github.com/EleutherAI/lm-evaluation-harness to evaluate OPT and BLOOM models, and GLM-130B’s official repo†††https://github.com/THUDM/GLM-130B for its own evaluation. Finally, we scale up our method to MT-NLG 530B (Smith et al., 2022) and for the first time enabling the serving of a >500B model within a single node. Note that we focus on the relative performance change before and after quantization but not the absolute value.
items.zh: 我们选择三个LLM系列来评估SmoothQuant：OPT（Zhang等人，2022）、BLOOM（Scao等人，2022）和GLM-130B（Zeng等人，2022）。我们使用七个零样本评估任务：LAMBADA（Paperno等人，2016）、HellaSwag（Zellers等人，2019）、PIQA（Bisk等人，2020）、WinoGrande（Sakaguchi等人，2019）、OpenBookQA（Mihaylov等人，2018）、RTE（Wang等人，2018）、COPA（Roemmele等人，2011），以及一个语言建模数据集WikiText（Merity等人，2016）来评估OPT和BLOOM模型。我们使用MMLU（Hendrycks等人，2020）、MNLI（Williams等人，2018）、QNLI（Wang等人，2018）和LAMBADA来评估GLM-130B模型，因为上述某些基准出现在GLM-130B的训练集中。我们使用lm-eval-harness***评估OPT和BLOOM模型，并使用GLM-130B的官方仓库†††进行其自身评估。最后，我们将方法扩展到MT-NLG 530B（Smith等人，2022），并首次实现在单个节点内服务超过500B的模型。注意，我们关注量化前后的相对性能变化，而非绝对值。

items.en: The migration strength α=0.5𝛼0.5\alpha=0.5 is a general sweet spot for all the OPT and BLOOM models, and α=0.75𝛼0.75\alpha=0.75 for GLM-130B since its activations are more difficult to quantize (Zeng et al., 2022). We get a suitable α𝛼\alpha by running a quick grid search on a subset of the Pile (Gao et al., 2020) validation set. To get the statistics of activations, we calibrate the smoothing factors and the static quantization step sizes once with 512 random sentences from the pre-training dataset Pile, and apply the same smoothed and quantized model for all downstream tasks. In this way, we can benchmark the generality and zero-shot performance of the quantized LLMs.
items.zh: 迁移强度α=0.5是所有OPT和BLOOM模型的通用最佳点，而GLM-130B的α=0.75，因为其激活更难量化（Zeng等人，2022）。我们通过在Pile（Gao等人，2020）验证集的一个子集上运行快速网格搜索来获得合适的α。为了获得激活的统计信息，我们使用来自预训练数据集Pile的512个随机句子校准一次平滑因子和静态量化步长，并对所有下游任务应用相同的平滑和量化模型。通过这种方式，我们可以评估量化LLM的通用性和零样本性能。

items.en: We implement SmoothQuant with two backends: (1) PyTorch Huggingface‡‡‡https://github.com/huggingface/transformers for the proof of concept, and (2) FasterTransformer§§§https://github.com/NVIDIA/FasterTransformer, as an example of a high-performance framework used in production environments. In both PyTorch Huggingface and FasterTransformer frameworks, we implement INT8 linear modules and the batched matrix multiplication (BMM) function with CUTLASS INT8 GEMM kernels. We simply replace the original floating point (FP16) linear modules and the bmm function with our INT8 kernels as the INT8 model.
items.zh: 我们使用两个后端实现SmoothQuant：（1）PyTorch Huggingface‡‡‡用于概念验证，以及（2）FasterTransformer§§§作为生产环境中使用的高性能框架示例。在PyTorch Huggingface和FasterTransformer框架中，我们使用CUTLASS INT8 GEMM内核实现INT8线性模块和批量矩阵乘法（BMM）函数。我们简单地将原始的浮点（FP16）线性模块和bmm函数替换为我们的INT8内核，作为INT8模型。

items.en: SmoothQuant can handle the quantization of very large LLMs, whose activations are more difficult to quantize. We study quantization on OPT-175B. As shown in Table 3, SmoothQuant can match the FP16 accuracy on all evaluation datasets with all quantization schemes. LLM.int8() can match the floating point accuracy because they use floating-point values to represent outliers, which leads to a large latency overhead (Table 10). The W8A8, ZeroQuant, and Outlier Suppression baselines produce nearly random results, indicating that naively quantizing the activation of LLMs will destroy the performance.
items.zh: SmoothQuant可以处理非常大的LLM的量化，这些模型的激活更难量化。我们研究了OPT-175B上的量化。如表3所示，SmoothQuant在所有量化方案下都能在所有评估数据集上匹配FP16精度。LLM.int8()可以匹配浮点精度，因为它们使用浮点值表示异常，这导致了较大的延迟开销（表10）。W8A8、ZeroQuant和Outlier Suppression基线产生近乎随机的结果，表明朴素地量化LLM的激活会破坏性能。

items.en: SmoothQuant can be applied to various LLM designs. In Table 4, we show SmoothQuant can quantize all existing open LLMs beyond 100B parameters. Compared with the OPT-175B model, the BLOOM-176B model is easier to quantize: none of the baselines completely destroys the model; even the naive W8A8 per-tensor dynamic quantization only degrades the accuracy by 4%. The O1 and O2 levels of SmoothQuant successfully maintain the floating point accuracy, while the O3 level (per-tensor static) degrades the average accuracy by 0.8%, which we attribute to the discrepancy between the statically collected statistics and the real evaluation samples’ activation statistics. On the contrary, the GLM-130B model is more difficult to quantize (which echos Zeng et al.). Nonetheless, SmoothQuant-O1 can match the FP16 accuracy, while SmoothQuant-O3 only degrades the accuracy by 1%, which significantly outperforms the baselines. Note that we clip the top 2% tokens when calibrating the static quantization step sizes for GLM-130B following Wei et al. (2022). Note that different model/training designs have different quantization difficulties, which we hope will inspire future research.
items.zh: SmoothQuant可以应用于各种LLM设计。在表4中，我们展示了SmoothQuant可以量化所有超过100B参数的现有开源LLM。与OPT-175B模型相比，BLOOM-176B模型更容易量化：没有一个基线完全破坏模型；即使是朴素的W8A8逐张量动态量化也仅使精度下降4%。SmoothQuant的O1和O2级别成功保持了浮点精度，而O3级别（逐张量静态）使平均精度下降0.8%，我们将其归因于静态收集的统计信息与实际评估样本的激活统计信息之间的差异。相反，GLM-130B模型更难量化（这与Zeng等人的结论一致）。尽管如此，SmoothQuant-O1可以匹配FP16精度，而SmoothQuant-O3仅使精度下降1%，显著优于基线。注意，在校准GLM-130B的静态量化步长时，我们按照Wei等人（2022）的方法裁剪了前2%的token。注意，不同的模型/训练设计具有不同的量化难度，我们希望这能激发未来的研究。

items.capEn: Figure 7: SmoothQuant-O3 (the most efficient setting, defined in Table 2) preserves the accuracy of OPT models across different scales when quantized to INT8. LLM.int8() requires mixed precision and suffers from slowing down.
items.capZh: 图7：SmoothQuant-O3（最高效的设置，定义见表2）在不同规模的OPT模型量化为INT8时保持了精度。LLM.int8()需要混合精度，并且会变慢。

items.en: SmoothQuant works not only for the very large LLMs beyond 100B parameters, but it also works consistently for smaller LLMs. In Figure 7, we show that SmoothQuant can work on all scales of OPT models, matching the FP16 accuracy with INT8 quantization.
items.zh: SmoothQuant不仅适用于超过100B参数的非常大的LLM，也一致地适用于较小的LLM。在图7中，我们展示了SmoothQuant可以适用于所有规模的OPT模型，在INT8量化下匹配FP16精度。

items.en: Shown in Table 5, SmoothQuant also works on instruction-tuned LLMs. We test SmoothQuant on the OPT-IML-30B model using the WikiText-2 and LAMBADA datasets. Our results show that SmoothQuant successfully preserves model accuracy with W8A8 quantization, whereas the baselines fail to do so. SmoothQuant is a general method designed to balance the quantization difficulty for Transformer models. As the architecture of instruction-tuned LLMs is not fundamentally different from vanilla LLMs, and their pre-training processes are very similar, SmoothQuant is applicable to instruction-tuned LLMs as well.
items.zh: 如表5所示，SmoothQuant也适用于指令微调的LLM。我们在OPT-IML-30B模型上使用WikiText-2和LAMBADA数据集测试了SmoothQuant。我们的结果表明，SmoothQuant在W8A8量化下成功保持了模型精度，而基线未能做到。SmoothQuant是一种通用方法，旨在平衡Transformer模型的量化难度。由于指令微调LLM的架构与普通LLM没有根本不同，并且它们的预训练过程非常相似，因此SmoothQuant也适用于指令微调LLM。

items.en: LLaMA models are new open languange models with superior performance (Touvron et al., 2023). Through initial experiments, we find LLaMA models generally have less severe activation outlier issues compared to models like OPT and BLOOM. Nonetheless, SmoothQuant still works quite well for LLaMA models. We provide some initial results of LLaMA W8A8 quantization in Table 6. SmoothQuant enables W8A8 quantization at a negligible performance degradation.
items.zh: LLaMA模型是性能优越的新型开源语言模型（Touvron等人，2023）。通过初步实验，我们发现LLaMA模型通常比OPT和BLOOM等模型具有更不严重的激活异常问题。尽管如此，SmoothQuant在LLaMA模型上仍然表现良好。我们在表6中提供了LLaMA W8A8量化的一些初步结果。SmoothQuant以可忽略的性能下降实现了W8A8量化。

items.en: In this section, we show the measured speedup and memory saving of SmoothQuant-O3 integrated into PyTorch and FasterTransformer.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们展示了将SmoothQuant-O3集成到PyTorch和FasterTransformer后测得的加速比和内存节省。

items.en: We measure the end-to-end latency of generating all hidden states for a batch of 4 sentences in one pass, i.e., the context stage latency. We record the (aggregated) peak GPU memory usage in this process. We only compare SmoothQuant with LLM.int8() because it is the only existing quantization method that can preserve LLM accuracy at all scales. Due to the lack of support for model parallelism in Huggingface, we only measure SmoothQuant’s performance on a single GPU for the PyTorch implementation, so we choose OPT-6.7B, OPT-13B, and OPT-30B for evaluation. In the FasterTransformer library, SmoothQuant can seamlessly work with Tensor Parallelism (Shoeybi et al., 2019) algorithm, so we test SmoothQuant on OPT-13B, OPT-30B, OPT-66B, and OPT-175B for both single and multi-GPU benchmarks. All our experiments are conducted on NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU servers.
items.zh: 我们测量了一次性生成4个句子批次的所有隐藏状态的端到端延迟，即上下文阶段延迟。我们记录此过程中的（聚合）峰值GPU内存使用量。我们仅将SmoothQuant与LLM.int8()进行比较，因为它是唯一能在所有规模下保持LLM精度的现有量化方法。由于Huggingface不支持模型并行，我们仅在PyTorch实现的单GPU上测量SmoothQuant的性能，因此我们选择OPT-6.7B、OPT-13B和OPT-30B进行评估。在FasterTransformer库中，SmoothQuant可以与张量并行（Shoeybi等人，2019）算法无缝协作，因此我们在OPT-13B、OPT-30B、OPT-66B和OPT-175B上测试了SmoothQuant的单GPU和多GPU基准测试。我们所有的实验均在NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU服务器上进行。

items.capEn: Figure 8: The PyTorch implementation of SmoothQuant-O3 achieves up to 1.51×\times speedup and 1.96×\times memory saving for OPT models on a single NVIDIA A100-80GB GPU, while LLM.int8() slows down the inference in most cases.
items.capZh: 图8：SmoothQuant-O3的PyTorch实现在单个NVIDIA A100-80GB GPU上为OPT模型实现了高达1.51倍的加速和1.96倍的内存节省，而LLM.int8()在大多数情况下会降低推理速度。

items.en: In Figure 8, we show the inference latency and peak memory usage based on the PyTorch implementation. SmoothQuant is consistently faster than the FP16 baseline, getting a 1.51x speedup on OPT-30B when the sequence length is 256. We also see a trend that the larger the model, the more significant the acceleration. On the other hand, LLM.int8() is almost always slower than the FP16 baseline, which is due to the large overhead of the mixed-precision activation representation. In terms of memory, SmoothQuant and LLM.int8() can all nearly halve the memory usage of the FP16 model, while SmoothQuant saves slightly more memory because it uses fully INT8 GEMMs.
items.zh: 在图8中，我们展示了基于PyTorch实现的推理延迟和峰值内存使用量。SmoothQuant始终比FP16基线更快，在序列长度为256的OPT-30B上获得了1.51倍的加速。我们还观察到，模型越大，加速效果越显著。另一方面，LLM.int8()几乎总是比FP16基线慢，这是由于混合精度激活表示的巨大开销。在内存方面，SmoothQuant和LLM.int8()都能将FP16模型的内存使用量几乎减半，而SmoothQuant由于使用全INT8 GEMM，节省的内存略多。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Inference latency (top) and memory usage (bottom) of the FasterTransformer implementation on NVIDIA A100-80GB GPUs. For smaller models, the latency can be significantly reduced with SmoothQuant-O3 by up to 1.56x compared to FP16. For the bigger models (OPT-66B and 175B), we can achieve similar or even faster inference using only half number of GPUs. Memory footprint is almost halved compared to FP16.
items.capZh: 图9：FasterTransformer实现在NVIDIA A100-80GB GPU上的推理延迟（上）和内存使用量（下）。对于较小的模型，使用SmoothQuant-O3可以将延迟显著降低，与FP16相比最高可达1.56倍。对于较大的模型（OPT-66B和175B），我们可以使用一半数量的GPU实现相似甚至更快的推理。与FP16相比，内存占用几乎减半。

items.en: As shown in Figure 9 (top), compared to FasterTransformer’s FP16 implementation of OPT, SmoothQuant-O3 can further reduce the execution latency of OPT-13B and OPT-30B by up to 1.56×\times when using a single GPU. This is challenging since FasterTransformer is already more than 3×\times faster compared to the PyTorch implementation for OPT-30B. Remarkably, for bigger models that have to be distributed across multiple GPUs, SmoothQuant achieves similar or even better latency using only half the number of GPUs (1 GPU instead of 2 for OPT-66B, 4 GPUs instead of 8 for OPT-175B). This could greatly lower the cost of serving LLMs. The amount of memory needed when using SmoothQuant-O3 in FasterTransformer is reduced by a factor of almost 2×\times, as shown on Figure 9 (bottom).
items.zh: 如图9（上）所示，与FasterTransformer的OPT FP16实现相比，SmoothQuant-O3在使用单个GPU时可以将OPT-13B和OPT-30B的执行延迟进一步降低高达1.56倍。这很有挑战性，因为FasterTransformer已经比OPT-30B的PyTorch实现快3倍以上。值得注意的是，对于必须分布在多个GPU上的较大模型，SmoothQuant仅使用一半数量的GPU（OPT-66B使用1个GPU而非2个，OPT-175B使用4个GPU而非8个）即可实现相似甚至更好的延迟。这可以大大降低服务LLM的成本。如图9（下）所示，在FasterTransformer中使用SmoothQuant-O3时所需的内存量减少了近2倍。

items.en: In Table 7, we show SmoothQuant can significantly accelerate the autoregressive decoding stage of LLMs. SmoothQuant constantly reduces the per-token decoding latency compared to FP16 (up to 1.42x speedup). Additionally, SmoothQuant halves the memory footprints for LLM inference, enabling the deployment of LLMs at a significantly lower cost.
items.zh: 在表7中，我们展示了SmoothQuant可以显著加速LLM的自回归解码阶段。与FP16相比，SmoothQuant持续降低了每个token的解码延迟（最高1.42倍加速）。此外，SmoothQuant将LLM推理的内存占用减半，从而能够以显著更低的成本部署LLM。

full.sec: 5.4 Scaling Up: 530B Model Within a Single Node

items.en: We can further scale up SmoothQuant beyond 500B-level models, enabling efficient and accurate W8A8 quantization of MT-NLG 530B (Smith et al., 2022). As shown in Table 8 and 9, SmoothQuant enables W8A8 quantization of the 530B model at a negligible accuracy loss. The reduced model size allows us to serve the model using half number of the GPUs (16 to 8) at a similar latency, enabling the serving of a >500B model within a single node (8×\timesA100 80GB GPUs).
items.zh: 我们可以进一步将SmoothQuant扩展到500B级以上的模型，实现对MT-NLG 530B（Smith等人，2022）的高效且准确的W8A8量化。如表8和表9所示，SmoothQuant在精度损失可忽略的情况下实现了530B模型的W8A8量化。模型尺寸的减小使我们能够使用一半数量的GPU（从16个减少到8个）以相似的延迟服务模型，从而在单个节点（8×A100 80GB GPU）内服务超过500B的模型。

items.en: We need to find a suitable migration strength α𝛼\alpha (see Equation 4) to balance the quantization difficulty of weights and activations. We ablate the effect of different α𝛼\alpha’s on OPT-175B with LAMBADA in Figure 10. When α𝛼\alpha is too small (<0.4), the activations are hard to quantize; when α𝛼\alpha is too large (>0.6), the weights will be hard to quantize. Only when we choose α𝛼\alpha from the sweet spot region (0.4-0.6) can we get small quantization errors for both weights and activations, and maintain the model performance after quantization.
items.zh: 我们需要找到合适的迁移强度α（见公式4）来平衡权重和激活的量化难度。我们在图10中展示了不同α对OPT-175B在LAMBADA上的影响。当α太小（<0.4）时，激活难以量化；当α太大（>0.6）时，权重难以量化。只有当α从最佳区域（0.4-0.6）中选择时，我们才能获得权重和激活的较小量化误差，并在量化后保持模型性能。

items.capEn: Figure 10: A suitable migration strength α𝛼\alpha (sweet spot) makes both activations and weights easy to quantize. If the α𝛼\alpha is too large, weights will be hard to quantize; if too small, activations will be hard to quantize.
items.capZh: 图10：合适的迁移强度α（最佳点）使激活和权重都易于量化。如果α太大，权重将难以量化；如果太小，激活将难以量化。

items.en: Pre-trained language models have achieved remarkable performance on various benchmarks by scaling up. GPT-3 (Brown et al., 2020b) is the first LLM beyond 100B parameters and achieves impressive few-shot/zero-shot learning results. Later works (Rae et al., 2021; Smith et al., 2022; Du et al., 2022; Chowdhery et al., 2022) continue to push the frontier of scaling, going beyond 500B parameters. However, as the language model gets larger, serving such models for inference becomes expensive and challenging. In this work, we show that our proposed method can quantize the three largest, openly available LLMs: OPT-175B (Zhang et al., 2022), BLOOM-176B (Scao et al., 2022) and GLM-130B (Zeng et al., 2022), and even MT-NLG 530B (Smith et al., 2022) to reduce the memory cost and accelerate inference.
items.zh: 预训练语言模型通过扩展规模在各种基准测试中取得了显著性能。GPT-3（Brown等人，2020b）是第一个超过100B参数的LLM，并实现了令人印象深刻的少样本/零样本学习结果。后续工作（Rae等人，2021；Smith等人，2022；Du等人，2022；Chowdhery等人，2022）继续推动扩展的前沿，超过500B参数。然而，随着语言模型变得更大，服务此类模型进行推理变得昂贵且具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们展示了我们提出的方法可以量化三个最大的公开可用LLM：OPT-175B（Zhang等人，2022）、BLOOM-176B（Scao等人，2022）和GLM-130B（Zeng等人，2022），甚至MT-NLG 530B（Smith等人，2022），以减少内存成本并加速推理。

items.en: Quantization is an effective method for reducing the model size and accelerating inference. It proves to be effective for various convolutional neural works (CNNs) (Han et al., 2016; Jacob et al., 2018; Nagel et al., 2019; Wang et al., 2019; Lin et al., 2020) and transformers (Shen et al., 2020; Kim et al., 2021; Liu et al., 2021; Wang et al., 2020; Bondarenko et al., 2021). Weight equalization (Nagel et al., 2019) and channel splitting (Zhao et al., 2019) reduce quantization error by suppressing the outliers in weights. However, these techniques cannot address the activation outliers, which are the major quantization bottleneck for LLMs (Dettmers et al., 2022).
items.zh: 量化是减少模型大小和加速推理的有效方法。它被证明对各种卷积神经网络（CNN）（Han等人，2016；Jacob等人，2018；Nagel等人，2019；Wang等人，2019；Lin等人，2020）和Transformer（Shen等人，2020；Kim等人，2021；Liu等人，2021；Wang等人，2020；Bondarenko等人，2021）有效。权重均衡（Nagel等人，2019）和通道分割（Zhao等人，2019）通过抑制权重中的异常值来减少量化误差。然而，这些技术无法解决激活异常值，这是LLM的主要量化瓶颈（Dettmers等人，2022）。

items.en: GPTQ (Frantar et al., 2022) applies quantization only to weights but not activations (please find a short discussion in Appendix A). ZeroQuant (Yao et al., 2022) and nuQmm (Park et al., 2022) use a per-token and group-wise quantization scheme for LLMs, which requires customized CUDA kernels. Their largest evaluated models are 20B and 2.7B, respectively and fail to maintain the performance of LLMs like OPT-175B. LLM.int8() (Dettmers et al., 2022) uses mixed INT8/FP16 decomposition to address the activation outliers. However, such implementation leads to large latency overhead, which can be even slower than FP16 inference. Outlier Suppression (Wei et al., 2022) uses the non-scaling LayerNorm and token-wise clipping to deal with the activation outliers. However, it only succeeds on small language models such as BERT (Devlin et al., 2019) and BART (Lewis et al., 2019) and fails to maintain the accuracy for LLMs (Table 4). Our algorithm preserves the performance of LLMs (up to 176B, the largest open-source LLM we can find) with an efficient per-tensor, static quantization scheme without retraining, allowing us to use off-the-shelf INT8 GEMM to achieve high hardware efficiency.
items.zh: GPTQ（Frantar等人，2022）仅对权重进行量化而不对激活进行量化（请参见附录A中的简短讨论）。ZeroQuant（Yao等人，2022）和nuQmm（Park等人，2022）对LLM使用逐token和逐组量化方案，这需要定制的CUDA内核。它们评估的最大模型分别为20B和2.7B，并且无法保持像OPT-175B这样的LLM的性能。LLM.int8()（Dettmers等人，2022）使用混合INT8/FP16分解来处理激活异常值。然而，这种实现会导致较大的延迟开销，甚至可能比FP16推理更慢。Outlier Suppression（Wei等人，2022）使用非缩放LayerNorm和逐token裁剪来处理激活异常值。然而，它仅成功应用于小型语言模型，如BERT（Devlin等人，2019）和BART（Lewis等人，2019），并且无法保持LLM的准确性（表4）。我们的算法通过高效的逐张量静态量化方案，无需重新训练即可保持LLM（高达176B，我们能找到的最大开源LLM）的性能，从而允许我们使用现成的INT8 GEMM实现高硬件效率。

items.en: We propose SmoothQuant, an accurate and efficient post-training quantization method to enable lossless 8-bit weight and activation quantization for LLMs up to 530B parameters. SmoothQuant enables the quantization for both weight and activations for all GEMMs in the LLMs, which significantly reduces the inference latency and memory usage compared with the mixed-precision activation quantization baseline. We integrate SmoothQuant into PyTorch and FasterTransformer, getting up to 1.56×\times inference acceleration and halving the memory footprint. SmoothQuant democratizes the application of LLMs by offering a turnkey solution to reduce the serving cost.
items.zh: 我们提出了SmoothQuant，一种准确且高效的后训练量化方法，用于实现高达530B参数的LLM的无损8位权重和激活量化。SmoothQuant实现了LLM中所有GEMM的权重和激活量化，与混合精度激活量化基线相比，显著降低了推理延迟和内存使用。我们将SmoothQuant集成到PyTorch和FasterTransformer中，实现了高达1.56倍的推理加速和内存占用减半。SmoothQuant通过提供交钥匙解决方案降低服务成本，使LLM的应用大众化。
